rule_text: In patient (DTC) materials use inclusive person-first phrasing such as "someone/people with dermatomyositis"; the term "patients" is acceptable only in HCP materials.
intent: Maintain inclusive, person-first patient language in DTC copy.
summary: Use inclusive person-first phrasing like "someone/people with dermatomyositis" in patient (DTC) materials; use "patients" only in HCP materials.
